meta.commit_message: Create bootstrap current class \(#4091\) CITATION.cff CODEOWNERS CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE.txt README.md documentation examples mkdocs.yml postBuild process process-tracking-data pyproject.toml tests tracking Add PlasmaBootstrapCurrent to Stellarator and update tests - Modified the Stellarator class to include plasma_bootstrap as a parameter. - Updated the physics fixture in unit tests to instantiate PlasmaBootstrapCurrent. - Refactored multiple test cases to utilize PlasmaBootstrapCurrent for bootstrap fraction calculations. - Ensured all relevant tests in test_physics.py and test_stellarator.py are updated to reflect the new structure.
